description: Discussion on Solana community validator updates, including mainnet and testnet status, and a recap of the validator educational workshop.
topic_summary: Validator updates and educational workshop recap [t=2:88-6:40]. Mainnet beta update 1.13.7 recommended [t=31:69-50:09]. Testnet upgrade and features rollout plan discussed [t=110:50-139:00]. Upcoming workshop planned for May 31 [t=251:78-264:19].
